channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Bike abandoned, 11th March
item.description:
This bike has been here nearly a week, can it please be removed?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Street, Finsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Constantly letting dog poo outside schools, 11th March
item.description:
This man, Nicky She (not sure about spellings) who lives in a flat off kimberley drive/maylands drive, let's his dog, and someone else's that he walks, poo outside Shenstone school and Royal Park Schools nearly every day. Today at 8.30am I confronted him and he became abusive, threatening and spat and me and my 2 children! His behaviour outside of 2 primary school is absolutely diabolical.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, St. Andrew's Road, Albany Park, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip mattress, 11th March
item.description:
Please remove fly tip of mattress.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Castleton Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ongoing pavement obstruction and waste outside Carmel Stamford Hill, 11th March
item.description:
The supermarket Carmel on Clapton Common (E5) uses the public pavement as a storage and loading area everyday. Large quantities of pallets, boxes and goods are regularly left across the footway outside the shop, causing obstruction and dirtiness.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clapton Common, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A Fly-tip Large - More than 10 black bags problem has been found, 11th March
item.description:
A Fly-tip Large - More than 10 black bags problem has been found by Brent Council

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Christchurch Avenue, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load (Estates)

item.title: Outside 4 Prince Arthur Road, NW3 6AU, 11th March
item.description:
Tree planted several years ago is pushing up pavement slabs and lifting a yellow gas cover with obvious risk to the integrity of the gas pipe underneath.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 16, Prince Arthur Road, Belsize Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This problem is still not fixed, 11th March
item.description:
This problem has been reported multiple times and our cases keep being marked ‘fixed’ when they have not been dealt with. We need this properly cleaning up this week - it’s been this way for months and we’ve had enough. It’s effecting all the local residents in the area and encouraging Flytipping and creating more litter issues nearby. We would like this flagging to a manager today and dealing with in full this week.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Battle Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose bricks again!, 11th March
item.description:
How many times does this crossing need attending??? Bricks are not suitable for the amount of busses that go over it. But how many times does this crossing need attending? This is a blatant waste of our money!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Widmore Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Left out cage, 11th March
item.description:
Left here and kids pulling it around in afternoons.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 30, Market Square, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chelmer Road needs cleaning, 11th March
item.description:
Do you regularly clean the street? On which day? Or do I need to keep report it? Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glyn Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped, 11th March
item.description:
Saw rubbish dumped at the end of Glendale Way, edge of Crossway Park. Please can this be cleared ASAP. Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Glendale Way, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge freezer and packaging flytipped, 11th March
item.description:
See above It's near a School and a CAMHS unit

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Overton Road, Loughborough Junction, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned broken furniture, 11th March
item.description:
Been there for a few days

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Point Hill, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Stones chippings and gravel need cleaning up please, 11th March
item.description:
Potholes repaired but loose stones chippings and tarmac near 22 needs cleaning up please. Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Irvine Way, Crofton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 11th March
item.description:
This large Papa John van is on the junction of Darwin road and cavendish avenue. The van is very large and obstructs the view making it extremely difficult for cars and people to cross the road (as you are unable to see what is coming around from the left). This a residential area and there are lots of children crossing making it very dangerous. I have witness two near missed car accidents because of this problem. This van has not moved in over a month

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Darwin Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large worsening pothole with debris on Derwent Street SE10, 11th March
item.description:
This pothole has been here for at least a month. The road surface has now broken open leaving large potholes and loose asphalt/aggregate across the carriageway, which presents a serious risk to cyclists, motorcyclists and vehicles.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Derwent Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins blocking pathway for pedestrians on daily basis, 11th March
item.description:
Bins blocking pavement on daily basis regardless of collection day. This has been the case for over 12 months. Wheelchair and other disabled pedestrians cannot navigate past due to these bins blocking path as well as pavement parking and tree swallowing up the path. Location is outside 1a Parkfield Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parkfield Way, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car, 11th March
item.description:
Abandoned car outside 13 Sunland Avenue. Has been parked for weeks without moving. It’s a silver Hyundai Reg LV59 NFG. It is currently taxed but the MOT expired in November 25
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sunland Avenue, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Yet more fly tip, 11th March
item.description:
This is a fly tipping hotspot and nothing ever seems to happen. Nothing ever seems to be investigated and it is disgusting for the residents and a very real obstacle for our elderly residents There is literally no deterrent

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 26, Evelyn Street, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog poo on pavement outside Miller & Carter, 11th March
item.description:
Dog poo on pavement needs to be removed please

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pickhurst Lane, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
